title: [kimi-review] 57c611c: [SEVERITY: high] **Commit message does not match diff.** The
description:
Commit: 57c611c5d
Message: fix(slip): add stats_mutex synchronization

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **Commit message does not match diff.** The message claims "add stats_mutex synchronization" to `slip_transport.c`, but the commit contains zero code changes — it only modifies an issue-tracker JSON file. If the actual fix lives in commit `f09ccc550` (as the close_reason claims), it cannot be verified from this commit, and the bug is being closed without any demonstrable fix here. Anyone bisecting or auditing `git log` for the slip stats race will be misled.
